untranslatable_reason: This signal describes an options calendar spread strategy (sell near-term call, buy longer-term call at same strike) with entry/exit based on options expiration and Greeks pricing dynamics. The available indicators are limited to price action and technical analysis on single instruments. Calendar spreads require: (1) options-specific logic (call/put selection, strike alignment, expiration dates), (2) options Greeks (implied volatility, theta decay, time value), (3) spread premium/debit calculations, and (4) expiration-based mechanics. None of these can be expressed using only OHLCV and the provided technical indicators. This strategy is fundamentally incompatible with a price-action backtest engine.
translation_notes: Signal requires options chain management, implied volatility surface analysis, and expiration calendar logic. Recommend implementing in a dedicated options strategy backtester with Greeks and volatility surface modeling capabilities.
